case_title: CALDWELL, ALMA JEAN vs. AMERICAN HOTELS, INC., D/B/A METROPOLITAN HOTEL et al

docket_entries.description: GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALDWELL, ALMA JEAN AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN HOTELS, INC., D/B/A METROPOLITAN HOTEL DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE UNITED TECHNOLOGIES CORPORATION OTIS ELEVATOR COMPANY SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-28-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-27-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-08-1995
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS & FEES AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED TECHNOLOGIES CORPORATION OTIS ELEVATOR COMPANY

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-28-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-28-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR APR-27-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
